_publications._publicationTitle: Bioluminescent imaging of intracranial vestibular schwannoma xenografts in NOD/SCID mice.

_contextSnippet: All mice with bioluminescence demonstrated robust viable human staining cells ranging from 244 to 1,854 cells observed on imaged slices. In contrast, mice without emissions showed very few tumor cells on FISH analysis ranging from 9 to 20 cells
details: Successfully identified viable human schwannoma cells with 244-1,854 cells observed in mice with bioluminescence versus only 9-20 cells in mice without emissions
